summary: Tested new module_aufgaben (Modul-First). Backend: 21/21 pytest passed (meta, settings, mitarbeiter, full CRUD, status PATCH with erledigt-stamping, validation 400s, stats, isolation, admin-delete). Frontend: /module/aufgaben renders, sidebar 'Aufgaben' (NEU) entry visible, stats cards (Offen/In Arbeit/Erledigt) with counts, kategorie filter chips, create-dialog with kategorie/prioritaet, status select (line-through on erledigt), edit & delete buttons all working. DB cleaned after testing (0 tasks remaining).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing data-testid on the 'Alle' filter button (line 165-170). All other kategorie filter buttons have data-testid='filter-kategorie-{key}', but 'Alle' has none, hindering automated reset-to-all testing.

action_items: (Optional/LOW) Add data-testid='filter-kategorie-alle' to the 'Alle' button in ModuleAufgabenPage.jsx around line 165 to allow E2E filter-reset coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: Routes file is clean and well-structured (~270 lines, single concern). Module-First respected: writes only to db.module_aufgaben & db.module_aufgaben_settings; reads db.users only for the read-only mitarbeiter dropdown.

DELETE permission rule is correct: admin can delete any, non-admin only own (created_by check at routes.py:251). Could not test non-admin path (no non-admin user in test scope) – behaviour verified by code review only.
Status timestamping is consistent in both PATCH /{id}/status and PUT /{id}: erledigt sets erledigt_am/von, switch back to offen/in_arbeit clears them. Good.

PUT route validates enums via _validate_enums(data) but does NOT check that 'titel' (when provided) is non-empty after strip(); empty string would silently overwrite. POST does check this. Minor consistency gap.
Frontend uses /api proxy via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly through the api helper. No hardcoded URLs.
ModuleAufgabenPage.jsx is 456 lines – within 700-line guideline but borderline; dialog component could be extracted in future.
seed_data_creation: None. All TEST_ prefixed tasks created during testing were deleted; final DB state: 0 aufgaben, stats {offen:0, in_arbeit:0, erledigt:0, gesamt:0} – live-DB clean as requested.
context_for_next_testing_agent: module_aufgaben endpoints are at /api/module-aufgaben (note: prefix added in server.py:114, NOT in routes.py – router has no internal prefix). Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_module_aufgaben.py is reusable and self-cleans. UI page at /module/aufgaben uses data-testid extensively except the 'Alle' kategorie filter button. When testing, prefer backend pytest first, then UI – AI/LLM not involved here so no extra waits needed.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A – no functional bugs found. Only one minor testability gap (missing data-testid on 'Alle' filter button).
